updateNote: Day 77 12:09 PM PDT refresh: CEASEFIRE EXTENDED 45 DAYS — Israel-Lebanon agree after Round 3 Washington talks (new expiry ~July 1; Pentagon military track May 29). IRGC SEIZES HUI CHAN — Honduras-flagged floating armory seized 38nm NE Fujairah, directed toward Iranian waters; Iran VP Aref: Hormuz belongs to Iran. IDF KIA: Staff Sgt. Negev Dagan (20, Golani) killed by Hezbollah mortar near Litani River — 6th IDF death since Lebanon ceasefire. IDF STRIKES: 40+ Hezbollah sites, ~15 operatives killed, primed rocket launchers destroyed. HADDAD STRIKE: Israel drops 13 bombs on Hamas Gaza leader in Gaza City (initial indications: killed). TRUMP WARNING: decimation of Iran to be continued! House WPA 212-212 fails (3rd consecutive). BRICS COLLAPSE: First-ever summit without joint statement — UAE blocked Iran language. UAE fast-tracks second Hormuz-bypass pipeline (operational 2027). Oil: Brent $106.89 (+33.9%), WTI $101.86 (+34.9%). Gas $4.53/gal. Hormuz Day 74.
